title: Bonnaya clausa
intro: Bonnaya clausa, also known as 'Kadukkai' in Tamil, is a type of climbing plant belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, making it a useful natural remedy for maintaining overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Bonnaya clausa include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include powder, decoction, and paste, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
taxonomy: Bonnaya clausa is classified as a species within the family Gesneriaceae. This family of flowering plants is commonly known as the African violet or gesneriad family. Bonnaya clausa is a member of the genus Bonnaya, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions.
